nasb.text: Then Mahalalel lived eight hundred and thirty years after he became the father of Jared, and he had other sons and daughters.

esv.text: Mahalalel lived after he fathered Jared 830 years and had other sons and daughters.

cnv.text: 瑪勒列生雅列以後，還活了八百三十年，並且生了其他的兒女。

ccb.text: 之后又活了八百三十年，生儿育女，

csbs.text: 玛勒列生了雅列之后，又活了八百三十年，并且生了其他的儿女。
